---
title: "Dog Breed Classifier"
author: "Nicholas Huang"
date: "2025-08-18"
categories: [fastai, deep learning]
image: "dogs.jpg"
---

# Try out my dog breed classifier: [Dog Breed Classifier](https://huggingface.co/spaces/nichbane/dog_breed_classifier)

This was my second attempt to build a Fastai model.<br>
Although the second lesson in the Fastai course is also a dog breed classifier, this code did not follow that example.<br>
I trained a model using the Stanford Dogs Dataset: http://vision.stanford.edu/aditya86/ImageNetDogs/

This exercise was to understand the components required to train a Fastai model as well as testing out the various pretrained vision models in the timm library.<br>
This model currently uses the levit-384 model
